raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding Citis mishandling of a billing dispute related to a charge from XXXX. 

I timely filed a dispute after the merchant failed to resolve the matter directly despite multiple attempts to contact them by phone on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. After receiving no response from the merchant, I submitted a formal dispute to Citi and provided supporting documentation. 

During the dispute process, communication from Citi has been inconsistent and deficient. I was informed that my dispute was closed due to an alleged lack of response from me ; however, I never received any request for additional information. This was the first time I was told such information was needed. 

More recently, I was contacted by a Citi investigator via email regarding the dispute. When I called Citi to follow up, multiple representatives were unable to locate or view the investigators email or any record of that communication in their system. This indicates a breakdown in internal documentation and case management. As a result, I have been unable to receive a clear explanation of the status of my dispute or the basis for prior decisions. 

Citi has failed to : Provide consistent and accurate information about my dispute status Properly document internal communications Ensure representatives have access to investigator correspondence Clearly explain the reason for closing or handling the dispute This lack of coordination has materially delayed resolution and undermines my ability to exercise my rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act.

I am requesting that Citi : Conduct a full review of the dispute, including all communications sent by their investigator Reopen and properly investigate the dispute if it was improperly closed Provide a written explanation of their findings Confirm that internal documentation systems are corrected to prevent further mishandling I am seeking a fair review of the dispute and compliance with applicable federal billing dispute regulations.
